agents.name: Analysis
agents.description: Performs consistency analysis across all specification artifacts. Verifies traceability, identifies gaps, contradictions, and orphaned items.

handoffs.label: Analysis Passed - Begin Implementation
handoffs.prompt: Consistency analysis PASSED. Begin test implementation. All artifacts verified and aligned.

handoffs.label: Return to Fix Gaps
handoffs.prompt: Consistency analysis found GAPS. Return to specification. See analysis-report.md for details.

agents.name: API Champion
agents.description: Defines strict REST API contracts in OpenAPI 3.0+ format. Creates the source of truth for API testing and client generation.

handoffs.label: Define Messaging Contracts
handoffs.prompt: API contracts complete. Define async messaging contracts. Input: .specify/specs/NNN/plan.md Output: .specify/specs/NNN/contracts/asyncapi.yaml

handoffs.label: Skip Messaging - Proceed to Tests
handoffs.prompt: API contracts complete. No async messaging needed. Proceed to test strategy.

agents.name: Architect
agents.description: Converts clarified specifications into technical designs including architecture, data models, and component design. Ensures design satisfies all requirements and follows constitution principles.

handoffs.label: Define API Contracts
handoffs.prompt: Architecture complete. Define REST API contracts. Input: .specify/specs/NNN/plan.md Output: .specify/specs/NNN/contracts/openapi.yaml

handoffs.label: Define Messaging Contracts
handoffs.prompt: Architecture complete. Define async messaging contracts. Input: .specify/specs/NNN/plan.md Output: .specify/specs/NNN/contracts/asyncapi.yaml

handoffs.label: Skip to Test Strategy
handoffs.prompt: No API/Messaging contracts needed. Proceed to test strategy. Input: .specify/specs/NNN/plan.md

agents.name: Brainstorming
agents.description: Guides progressive ideation and architectural brainstorming sessions before formal specification begins. Helps explore ideas, challenge assumptions, and shape feature scope. Runs before Phase 0 or at any time for exploratory work.

handoffs.label: Establish Constitution
handoffs.prompt: Brainstorming complete. Establish project constitution based on our conclusions. Key decisions from brainstorm: [summary]

handoffs.label: Begin Requirements Capture
handoffs.prompt: Brainstorming complete. Capture requirements based on our conclusions. Key decisions from brainstorm: [summary]

agents.name: Clarification
agents.description: Facilitates structured clarification sessions to resolve ambiguities in specifications. Routes questions to appropriate stakeholders (PO for business, Dev Lead for technical) and documents all decisions.

handoffs.label: Proceed to Architecture
handoffs.prompt: Clarification complete. All questions resolved. Artifacts ready for technical design: - .specify/specs/NNN/business-context.md - .specify/specs/NNN/spec.md - .specify/specs/NNN/clarifications.md

handoffs.label: Return to Specification
handoffs.prompt: Clarification revealed spec gaps. Return to detailed specification mode. Update spec.md based on clarifications.md findings.

agents.name: Constitution
agents.description: Establishes foundational project principles, technology constraints, and quality standards that govern all subsequent development work. Run once per project.

handoffs.label: Begin Requirements Capture
handoffs.prompt: Constitution established. Begin capturing business requirements. Reference: .specify/memory/constitution.md

agents.name: Gherkin Analyst
agents.description: Guides testers through creating comprehensive BDD/Gherkin test scenarios from user stories. Uses a positive-first, teaching-oriented approach with structured clarification phases before writing any scenarios.

handoffs.label: Continue with Task Breakdown
handoffs.prompt: BDD scenarios complete. Generate task breakdown for implementation. Mode: PLANNING Inputs: - .specify/specs/NNN/plan.md - .specify/specs/NNN/test-cases.md

handoffs.label: Run Consistency Analysis
handoffs.prompt: BDD scenarios and test cases ready. Run consistency analysis. Verify all requirements have coverage.

agents.name: Messaging Champion
agents.description: Defines async messaging contracts in AsyncAPI 3.0+ format. Creates the source of truth for event-driven communication.

handoffs.label: Proceed to Test Strategy
handoffs.prompt: All contracts complete (API + Messaging). Proceed to test strategy definition. Artifacts: - .specify/specs/NNN/plan.md - .specify/specs/NNN/contracts/openapi.yaml - .specify/specs/NNN/contracts/asyncapi.yaml

agents.name: Refactoring
agents.description: Analyzes code against constitution principles and specification artifacts. Identifies tech debt, architecture violations, and improvement opportunities. Produces a structured refactoring plan with full traceability. Runs in Phase 5 alongside Review, or on-demand for existing codebases.

handoffs.label: Implement Refactoring
handoffs.prompt: Refactoring plan ready for implementation. See .specify/specs/NNN/refactoring-plan.md for details. Mode: IMPL

handoffs.label: Re-review After Refactoring
handoffs.prompt: Refactoring complete. Re-run quality review. Check ship-checklist.md and refactoring-plan.md.

agents.name: Requirement Analyst
agents.description: Transforms business needs into structured requirements. Operates in three modes - Vision Mode (PO input → business context), Detailed Mode (FA elaboration → spec), and Teaching Mode (mentoring junior POs/FAs through the process).

handoffs.label: Elaborate with Functional Analyst
handoffs.prompt: Business context captured. Now elaborate into detailed specification. Mode: DETAILED Input: .specify/specs/NNN/business-context.md

handoffs.label: Begin Clarification Session
handoffs.prompt: Specification complete. Begin clarification to resolve ambiguities. Artifacts ready: - .specify/specs/NNN/business-context.md - .specify/specs/NNN/spec.md

handoffs.label: Switch to Teaching Mode
handoffs.prompt: User needs mentoring on requirements engineering. Mode: TEACHING

agents.name: Review
agents.description: Performs final quality review before shipping. Validates that implementation meets specification, follows standards, and is production-ready.

handoffs.label: Approved - Ready to Ship
handoffs.prompt: ✅ Feature APPROVED and ready to ship. All quality gates passed. Next steps: merge PR, deploy, and close the feature.

handoffs.label: Changes Requested
handoffs.prompt: Review found issues. Changes requested. See ship-checklist.md for specific items.

agents.name: Software Engineer
agents.description: Implements features in small, verifiable chunks following the technical plan. Works to make tests pass. Operates in two modes - PLANNING (generate tasks) and IMPLEMENTATION (write code).

handoffs.label: Request Code Review
handoffs.prompt: Implementation complete. All tests passing. Request quality review before shipping.

handoffs.label: Tests Failing - Debug
handoffs.prompt: Implementation complete but tests failing. Need test review to determine if test or implementation issue.

handoffs.label: Architecture Question
handoffs.prompt: Implementation blocked on architectural question. Need design guidance before proceeding.

agents.name: Tech Context Maintainer
agents.description: Monitors drift between implementation code, specification artifacts, and constitution. Detects stale documentation, undocumented changes, and spec-code mismatches. Produces drift reports with actionable recommendations. Runs as a maintenance agent after implementation or on a scheduled basis.

handoffs.label: Fix Spec Drift
handoffs.prompt: Drift detected between implementation and specifications. See drift-report.md for details. Update specs to match current implementation or clarify intent.

handoffs.label: Fix Code Drift
handoffs.prompt: Drift detected — code diverges from approved specifications. See drift-report.md for details. Align implementation with spec or escalate for spec change.

handoffs.label: Discuss Discrepancies
handoffs.prompt: Significant discrepancies found between code and specs. See drift-report.md for details. Let's analyze and decide how to proceed.

agents.name: Test Engineer
agents.description: Implements executable test code from test case specifications. Works in parallel with Software Engineer, writing tests that initially fail (TDD).

handoffs.label: Tests Ready - Implement Features
handoffs.prompt: Test suite implemented. Tests are FAILING (expected - TDD). Begin feature implementation to make tests pass.

handoffs.label: Request Test Case Clarification
handoffs.prompt: Test implementation blocked. Need clarification on test cases. See specific questions below.

agents.name: Test Explorer
agents.description: Generates comprehensive test strategies and test case specifications from requirements and technical design. Creates the test blueprint before implementation.

handoffs.label: Generate Task Breakdown
handoffs.prompt: Test cases defined. Generate task breakdown for implementation. Mode: PLANNING Inputs: - .specify/specs/NNN/plan.md - .specify/specs/NNN/test-cases.md

handoffs.label: Create BDD Scenarios
handoffs.prompt: Test strategy complete. Create BDD/Gherkin scenarios. Inputs: - .specify/specs/NNN/spec.md - .specify/specs/NNN/test-cases.md

handoffs.label: Run Consistency Analysis
handoffs.prompt: Test cases and tasks ready. Run consistency analysis. Verify all requirements have coverage.
